name: HMS Terje 4 (FY 339)
events: 9 Aug 1940 HrMs O 9 (Lt. H.A.W. Goossens, RNN) participated in A/S exercises off Tobermory with HMS Helier 2 (Skr. J. Mawer, RNR) and HMS Terje 4 (Skr. J. Hodson, RNR). (1)
10 Aug 1940 HrMs O 9 (Lt. H.A.W. Goossens, RNN) participated in A/S exercises off Tobermory with HMS Terje 4 (Skr. J. Hodson, RNR). (1)
